calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Roosevelt for Wells Fargo Bank and Anders Maxwell.

Mr. Roosevelt provided explanation and details as to the services provided in support of the request for extraordinary fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition For Third Order Of Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Second Order Of Preliminary Distribution And For Allowance On Account Of Statutory Compensation Of Executors And Attorneys
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Order Of Prelim Distribution And For Allowance On Acct Of Statutory Compensation Of Executors And Attys
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2005 Granted Per Written Order
